---
title: "FME publications"
hero_image: /img/FME_Banner_website_V3.png
hero_darken: false
output: 
  md_document:
    includes:
      in_header: yaml.txt
sitemap:
  exclude: 'yes'
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

_Last extraction `r Sys.time()`_

```{r grouped_publications, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
suppressWarnings(suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(bibtex)))

bibliography_file <- "FME_publications_sorted_2.bib"
csl_file <- "nature.csl"

publication_year <- function(entry) {
  year <- entry$year

  if (is.null(year) || length(year) == 0) {
    return(NA_integer_)
  }

  year <- as.character(year)[1]
  suppressWarnings(as.integer(substr(year, 1, 4)))
}

publication_doi <- function(entry) {
  doi <- entry$doi

  if (is.null(doi) || length(doi) == 0) {
    return(NA_character_)
  }

  doi <- tolower(trimws(as.character(doi)[1]))
  if (identical(doi, "")) {
    return(NA_character_)
  }

  doi
}

entry_score <- function(entry) {
  fields <- as.list(entry)
  sum(vapply(fields, function(value) {
    !is.null(value) && length(value) > 0 && !all(is.na(value))
  }, logical(1)))
}

deduplicate_by_doi <- function(entries) {
  dois <- vapply(entries, publication_doi, character(1))
  keep <- rep(TRUE, length(entries))

  for (doi in unique(dois[!is.na(dois)])) {
    matches <- which(dois == doi)

    if (length(matches) > 1) {
      scores <- vapply(entries[matches], entry_score, integer(1))
      best <- matches[which.max(scores)]
      keep[setdiff(matches, best)] <- FALSE
    }
  }

  entries[keep]
}

render_bibliography <- function(entries) {
  temp_bib <- tempfile(fileext = ".bib")
  temp_md <- tempfile(fileext = ".md")
  temp_output <- tempfile(fileext = ".md")

  invisible(capture.output(
    invisible(capture.output(
      suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(write.bib(entries, file = temp_bib))),
      type = "message"
    ))
  ))

  writeLines(c(
    "---",
    paste0("bibliography: ", normalizePath(temp_bib, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)),
    paste0("csl: ", normalizePath(csl_file, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)),
    "nocite: '@*'",
    "---",
    ""
  ), temp_md, useBytes = TRUE)

  rmarkdown::pandoc_convert(
    input = temp_md,
    to = "markdown_strict",
    output = temp_output,
    options = "--citeproc"
  )

  rendered <- readLines(temp_output, warn = FALSE, encoding = "UTF-8")
  rendered <- rendered[!grepl("^---$", rendered)]
  rendered <- rendered[!grepl("^(bibliography|csl|nocite):", rendered)]
  rendered <- rendered[!grepl("^::: \\{#refs", rendered)]
  rendered <- rendered[!grepl("^:::$", rendered)]
  rendered <- gsub("doi:[", "doi: [", rendered, fixed = TRUE)

  rendered
}

renumber_bibliography <- function(lines, start_at) {
  next_number <- start_at

  for (i in seq_along(lines)) {
    if (grepl('<span class="csl-left-margin">[0-9]+\\.', lines[i])) {
      lines[i] <- sub(
        '<span class="csl-left-margin">[0-9]+\\.',
        paste0('<span class="csl-left-margin">', next_number, "."),
        lines[i]
      )
      next_number <- next_number + 1
    }
  }

  list(lines = lines, next_number = next_number)
}

bib_entries <- read.bib(bibliography_file)
bib_entries <- deduplicate_by_doi(bib_entries)

years <- vapply(bib_entries, publication_year, integer(1))
sort_years <- ifelse(is.na(years), -Inf, years)
bib_entries <- bib_entries[order(sort_years, decreasing = TRUE, na.last = TRUE)]
years <- years[order(sort_years, decreasing = TRUE, na.last = TRUE)]

year_groups <- unique(years[!is.na(years)])
next_publication_number <- 1

render_year_group <- function(year, start_at) {
  rendered <- render_bibliography(bib_entries[which(years == year)])
  rendered <- renumber_bibliography(rendered, start_at)

  cat("\n\n## ", year, "\n\n", sep = "")
  cat(rendered$lines, sep = "\n")

  rendered$next_number
}

render_previous_year_group <- function(year, start_at) {
  rendered <- render_bibliography(bib_entries[which(years == year)])
  rendered <- renumber_bibliography(rendered, start_at)

  cat("\n\n### ", year, "\n\n", sep = "")
  cat(rendered$lines, sep = "\n")

  rendered$next_number
}

current_years <- year_groups[year_groups >= 2020]
previous_years <- year_groups[year_groups < 2020]

for (year in current_years) {
  next_publication_number <- render_year_group(year, next_publication_number)
}

if (any(is.na(years))) {
  rendered <- render_bibliography(bib_entries[which(is.na(years))])
  rendered <- renumber_bibliography(rendered, next_publication_number)
  next_publication_number <- rendered$next_number

  cat("\n\n## Undated\n\n")
  cat(rendered$lines, sep = "\n")
}

if (length(previous_years) > 0) {
  cat('\n\n<center>\n')
  cat('<button id="showPreviousPublicationsBtn" class="button is-primary">Show Previous years</button>\n')
  cat('</center>\n\n')
  cat('## Previous years\n\n')

  for (year in previous_years) {
    next_publication_number <- render_previous_year_group(year, next_publication_number)
  }

  cat('\n<script>\n')
  cat('document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {\n')
  cat('  const btn = document.getElementById("showPreviousPublicationsBtn");\n')
  cat('  const marker = document.getElementById("previous-publications-toggle-end");\n')
  cat('  const previousHeading = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("h2")).find(function(heading) {\n')
  cat('    return heading.textContent.trim() === "Previous years";\n')
  cat('  });\n')
  cat('  if (!btn || !previousHeading || !marker) {\n')
  cat('    return;\n')
  cat('  }\n')
  cat('  const previousNodes = [];\n')
  cat('  let node = previousHeading;\n')
  cat('  while (node && node !== marker) {\n')
  cat('    previousNodes.push(node);\n')
  cat('    node = node.nextElementSibling;\n')
  cat('  }\n')
  cat('  function setPreviousPublicationsVisible(isVisible) {\n')
  cat('    previousNodes.forEach(function(previousNode) {\n')
  cat('      previousNode.classList.toggle("is-hidden", !isVisible);\n')
  cat('    });\n')
  cat('    btn.textContent = isVisible ? "Hide Previous years" : "Show Previous years";\n')
  cat('  }\n')
  cat('  setPreviousPublicationsVisible(false);\n')
  cat('  btn.addEventListener("click", function() {\n')
  cat('    setPreviousPublicationsVisible(previousHeading.classList.contains("is-hidden"));\n')
  cat('  });\n')
  cat('});\n')
  cat('</script>\n')
  cat('<span id="previous-publications-toggle-end"></span>\n')
}
```
